---
title: "week_2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Annual stream flow and precip

calculating yearly streamflow and yearly precip and calculate percentage of each

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

p301 <- read.csv(here("Data", "p301.csv"))

#aggregate by water year
p301_yearly <- p301 |>
  group_by(wy)
```
